description: Schema for agent action parity vectors. Six envelope-accepted deterministic JSON observation payloads covering all six event_kind values (one per kind). Per the parity-corpus convention, all vectors assert envelope-level canonical agreement and set expected.accepted=true; semantic-rejection cases for forbidden top-level keys, opaque-ref grammar violations, missing required fields, and unknown event_kind live in the schema validator tests at packages/schema/__tests__/extensions/agent-action.test.ts.
